data.body: Not a defect on current main: `force_reclaim` was added to `_with_index_lock_retry` AND all event_append callers atomically in commit 485873652 (2026-07-17), 5 days before this report. Only one definition exists repo-wide and the plan-review persist path reaches it via append_event -> stage_and_commit -> _git_*(force_reclaim=True). Runtime-verified on main: the kwarg is accepted, calling with force_reclaim=True raises nothing, and all 47 index-lock/contention tests pass. The TypeError reflects a stale/mixed install (new event_append + old in-memory gitutil — the 'MCP server won't hot-reload' caveat), not a main defect. Closing as already-resolved; restart/reinstall the rebar-mcp process to clear the stale module.
